rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed all three required configuration changes: (1) log verbosity increased from 0 to 1 (one level up), (2) slow-operation threshold doubled from 100ms to 200ms, and (3) WiredTiger journal compression switched from snappy to zlib. The approach — creating a ConfigMap with mongod.conf and patching the StatefulSet to mount it — is a correct, persistent, non-operator method. The rolling restart with maxUnavailable=1 maintained quorum throughout (verified: 1 primary + 4 secondaries online at all times). All settings were explicitly verified via mongosh on every pod after restart. The oracle verdict is pass. The regression sweep failures are environment teardown artifacts (pods/statefulsets no longer found after namespace cleanup), not regressions caused by this stage. The task description says 3 members but the actual cluster had 5; the agent correctly applied to all actual running members.
